# CHAOS Todo Command Contract

The compact, mechanical contract behind `.github/prompts/chaos-todo.prompt.md`. Full detail
lives in this skill's other reference files; this file is the one-stop summary a weaker model
can follow step by step.

## Identity

`chaos:todo` discovers, normalizes, deduplicates, prioritizes, and maintains actionable work
generated by CHAOS workflows. CHAOS reports create evidence; `chaos:todo` turns evidence into
executable backlog.

It is **not** a replacement for `chaos:status` (workspace/governance health), `chaos:sync`
(governance/source-of-truth reconciliation), `chaos:retro` (lessons from a completed change), or
roadmap files (release/product direction). `chaos:todo` answers: **what concrete actionable
work is pending?**

## Invocation surface

```text
chaos:todo
chaos:todo --scan
chaos:todo --next
chaos:todo --from-roadmap
chaos:todo --from-audit <path>
chaos:todo --from-change <change-id>
chaos:todo --target <target>
chaos:todo --priority <priority>
chaos:todo --status <status>
chaos:todo --type <type>
chaos:todo --write
chaos:todo --dry-run
chaos:todo --dedupe
chaos:todo --refresh
chaos:todo --close <todo-id>
chaos:todo --reopen <todo-id>
chaos:todo --update <todo-id>
```

Flags compose (e.g. `chaos:todo --target public-alpha --priority BLOCKER`).

## Modes

### `--light`

- Read the existing todo index/items if present.
- Read current `.chaos/status-report.md` / latest doctor report if present.
- Show immediate blockers and next actions.
- No deep scan of all evidence sources.
- No writes unless the user explicitly confirms or passes `--write`.

### `--standard` (default)

- Scan the normal evidence sources (`todo-source-contract.md`): roadmap, status, changes,
  sync reports, doctor reports.
- Deduplicate candidates (`todo-deduplication-policy.md`).
- Propose item creation/update/closure.
- Write only after confirmation or `--write`.

### `--strict`

- Scan all configured sources.
- Validate every open todo still has source evidence (stale detection,
  `todo-status-model.md`).
- Detect stale/closed/duplicated items, orphan roadmap items, findings without todos, and
  todos with missing source artifacts.
- Require maintainer confirmation for repository-wide writes; block unsafe global writes
  without confirmation.

## Default behavior (no flags)

Read-first and safe. Produce the chat dashboard (`todo-report-template.md`), then ask before
writing:

```text
Write/update todo backlog and HTML views?

1. Yes, write proposed updates
2. Dry-run only
3. Show details
4. Stop
```

STOP after presenting this. Do not continue until the user selects an option.

## Non-negotiable execution checklist

- [ ] Read `.chaos/config.yaml`; resolve `paths.todo`/`todoItems`/`todoViews` and
      `policies.todo.*` before defaults (`todo-config-contract.md`).
- [ ] Scan evidence before writing anything (`todo-source-contract.md`).
- [ ] Every durable item requires source evidence (`policies.todo.requireSourceEvidence`).
- [ ] Dedupe before writing (`todo-deduplication-policy.md`).
- [ ] Ask one material decision at a time; stop after presenting it
      (`.github/skills/chaos-shared/reference/interactive-decision-protocol.md`).
- [ ] Never edit production code, tests, migrations, OpenSpec content, ADRs, decision logs,
      rules, gates, `AGENTS.md`, or `README.md`.
- [ ] Write durable todo item files only under the configured todo paths
      (`todo-write-policy.md`).
- [ ] Generate HTML views for human digest — never Markdown digest reports
      (`todo-html-view-contract.md`).
- [ ] Generated HTML views are not source of truth; durable Markdown items are.
- [ ] Physical item filenames are date-prefixed slugs, never sequential IDs
      (`todo-item-schema.md`).
- [ ] Repository-level (maintainer-sensitive) writes require the maintainer confirmation
      decision (`todo-write-policy.md`).
